ddls:
CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the funding source (e.g., federal, state, local, private) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the funding source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the funding source is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year (e.g., FY 2020) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fiscal year (e.g., Open, Closed, Pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount allocated for that year */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department allocated the funding */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific project the funding is allocated to */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the allocation was made */,
  "allocated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who made the allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_allocations_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_allocations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_allocations_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES funding_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_funding" (
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for total funding records */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount received across all fiscal years */,
  "share_percentage" REAL /* Percentage share of total funding */,
  "start_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the start of the total funding period */,
  "end_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the end of the total funding period */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the total funding was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_funding_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries regarding funding */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the department */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the department record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding request */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department making the request */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source requested */,
  "amount_requested" REAL /* Amount requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the funding request */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific project for which funding is requested */,
  "justification" TEXT /* Justification for the funding request */,
  "attachment" TEXT /* URL or path to any attached documents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_requests_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_requests_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the funding request (e.g., Pending, Approved, Denied) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last status update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who updated the status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_statuses_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES funding_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the budget report (e.g., Annual, Quarterly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount covered in the report */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_reports_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget item */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated budget report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the budget item */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount allocated for the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the budget item (e.g., Capital, Expense) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the budget item (e.g., Infrastructure, Healthcare) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific project the item is related to */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the budget item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_items_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES budget_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit was conducted */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings from the audit */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of the audit (e.g., Internal, External) */,
  "audited_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or organization conducting the audit */,
  "attachment" TEXT /* URL or path to any audit documents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_audits_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit result */,
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated audit */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation provided post-audit */,
  "implementation_status" TEXT /* Current implementation status of the recommendation */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the recommendation (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for implementing the recommendation */,
  "responsible_person" TEXT /* Name of the person responsible for implementation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_results_audit_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_id") REFERENCES financial_audits ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., accountant, manager, auditor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)
